zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford於1025年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯曼-拉-喬利時，他的父親Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens29歲，母親Godgifu 'Goda'21歲。他於1042年與Gytha Countess of Hereford在英國英格蘭素福爾可艾可寧結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1096年登記服兵役。他去世於1057年12月21日在英國諾薩普頓史爾比特爾波洛享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾比特爾波洛比特爾波洛 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford于1025年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯曼-拉-喬利时，他的父亲Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens29岁，母亲Godgifu 'Goda'21岁。他于1042年与Gytha Countess of Hereford在英国英格兰素福爾可艾可寧结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1096年登记服兵役。他去世于1057年12月21日在英国諾薩普頓史爾比特爾波洛享年32岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾比特爾波洛比特爾波洛 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mantes,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish and Portuguese: plural form of   Manta  .

variants.name: Manta
meanings: Italian (southern, mainly Salento), Portuguese, and Spanish: from manta ‘(wool) blanket’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of such items.
Italian: from the personal name Manta, feminine form of Manto 1, of ancient Germanic origin.
Portuguese: habitational name from a place called Manta in Aveiro province.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford was born in 1025, in Mantes-la-Jolie, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, his father, Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens, was 29 and his mother, Godgifu 'Goda', was 21. He married Gytha Countess of Hereford in 1042, in Exning, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1096. He died on 21 December 1057, in Peterborough, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 32, and was buried in Peterborough Cathedral, Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford est né en 1025, à Mantes-la-Jolie, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Godgifu 'Goda', avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Gytha Countess of Hereford en 1042, à Exning, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1096. Il est décédé le 21 décembre 1057, à Peterborough, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Peterborough Cathedral, Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Peterborough Cathedral, Peterborough, Ca: Peterborough Cathedral, Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford 1025 in Mantes-la-Jolie, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens 29 und seine Mutter Godgifu 'Goda' 21. Er hat 1042 in Exning, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Gytha Countess of Hereford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1096 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 21. Dezember 1057 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Peterborough, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Peterborough Cathedral, Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford è nato il nel 1025 nel Mantes-la-Jolie, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Godgifu 'Goda', aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Gytha Countess of Hereford nel 1042, nel Exning, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1096. Morì il 21 dicembre 1057, nel Peterborough, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Peterborough Cathedral, Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Herefordが1025年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスマンテス-ラ-ジョリーで生まれた時，父Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiensは29歳，母Godgifu 'Goda'は21歳であった。1042年にイギリスイギリススフォルクエクスニングでGytha Countess of Herefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1096年に兵役登録をした。彼は1057年12月21日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアペテルボロウで32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアペテルボロウペテルボロウ カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.Peterborough Cathedral, Peterborough, Ca: 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 피터버루그h 피터버루그h 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford(이)가 1025년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 먼티스-라-조리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Godgifu 'Goda'(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1042년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스닝에서 Gytha Countess of Hereford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1096년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1057년 12월 21일 영국 노르섬프토실르 피터버루그h에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 피터버루그h 피터버루그h 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.Peterborough Cathedral, Peterborough, Ca: Peterborough Cathedral, Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford nasceu em 1025, em Mantes-la-Jolie, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Godgifu 'Goda', tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Gytha Countess of Hereford em 1042, em Exning, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1096. Ele faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1057, em Peterborough, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Peterborough Cathedral, Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Peterborough Cathedral, Peterborough, Ca: питирбороую кэтедраль, питирбороую, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford родился в 1025 г. в местности мантес-ла-джоли, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Godgifu 'Goda', 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Gytha Countess of Hereford в 1042 г. в местности экснинг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1096 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 21 декабря 1057 г. в местности питирбороую, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности питирбороую кэтедраль, питирбороую, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford nació en 1025, en Mantes-la-Jolie, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Dreux de Mantes Comte du Vexin et d'Amiens, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Godgifu 'Goda', tenía 21 años. Se casó con Gytha Countess of Hereford en 1042, en Exning, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1096. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1057, en Peterborough, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Peterborough Cathedral, Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
